text.message: I’ll do it if you don’t plow
Mono the wheat if you have
Good try but I just need a 6
It was over apart from that roll
i'm not trading if u don't take now
I need the wood, so if you mono give me wood back
take it or i'm not trading it
Well to be fair blue, you kept robbing me
You let green off the hook which allowed them to chase army
But it was often already there so
Can’t believe you robbed me when blue easily takes road
I was gonna move it anyway
I’m glad tho. I played this game correctly and that’s all u can hope for
Can’t expect that terrible thoughtless block from green
